No-touch proof remained clean for this run.

recommendations.title: Legacy glow-spend telemetry is high without perceptual washout
recommendations.suspectedCause: The legacy overbright metric is measuring sustained glow spend; tune or relabel it separately from visible washout.

recommendations.title: Ring authority is lingering too long or over-drawing the chamber read
recommendations.suspectedCause: Ring persistence and field density are staying too dominant after the cue should move on.

recommendations.title: Palette movement is not reading as musically earned
recommendations.suspectedCause: Base palette or hero/world color roles are changing without a strong motif, phrase, release, rupture, or authority reason.

recommendations.title: Hero shape changes are not consistently matching the semantic plan
recommendations.suspectedCause: Hero form scoring or novelty pressure is still overriding the planned motif grammar too often.

recommendations.title: Playable motif scenes are not reading as stable authored scenes
recommendations.suspectedCause: Scene routing, palette base, or signature moment posture is drifting away from the locked motif instead of holding an authored scene long enough to read.
targetMetrics: dominantParticleFieldJob != none when particles are active
